feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Accelerator Hub
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Accelerator Hub Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Custom Tables Trace missing via Tcode ST12
entry.content:
There could be several reasons when some traces were not found from the collected ST12 trace.
Most of them is caused by the setting for the ST12 trace.
　
1. No. trace activations
If a trace is collected in a dialog mode with the option 'User/Trasks', all processes executed by the specified user will be the target of the trace.
And in case of ST12, only 1 trace will be activated at one time so the first process which is caught by the trace demon will be the target.

Let's say, a ST12 trace is collected with a user name "A" in a dialog mode(not a scheduled mode by '>Schedule' button) and value 5 is configured for 'No. trace activations'.
In this case, 5 traces will be activated for processes executed by the specified user.
So the 5 processes which are caught by the trace demon in order will be traced but the traces for other processes will be not collected.
　
As mentioned in the section 'Trace for - User/Task' of the KBA 2436955, enough values of 'No. trace activations' need to be configured. Maximum 99 traces can be activated.
　
2. Size & Duration
There are limitations with the ST12 trace.
Regardless how many traces are activated, if the total time of trace reaches to the maximum time or the size of collected traces reaches to the maximum size, the trace will be stopped.
　
The time and size is configured in the section 'Size & Duration' of ST12 screen.
It is set to Large (20MB/4200 sec max.) by default.
But if the trace you are going to collect is big or if you don't know how big it is, it is recommended to set it to 'Max' with '99BM/4200 sec max.'.
It is same in a dialog mode or in a scheduled mode by '>Schedule' button. Details also can be checked from the KBA 2511272.
　
3. Processes which were not finished before the trace was stopped
The trace will collect the processes which was started after the trace was started (In a scheduled mode by the button '>Schedule>', I recommend to set the start time of the trace at least 5 minutes before the targer processes are started.).
　
And the trace which were started after the trace was started but not finished before the trace was stopped, it will not be included in the trace. Especially, long SQL executions which were not finished before the trace was stopped, its trace will not be recorded in the result.
　
With all above points in mind, I recommend you to collect ST12 trace once again.

entry.title: Re: Story report Duplicate records Issues
entry.content: Hi Gloria, Thanks for the update.. I have tried with your answers, I am able to resolve 80% of the duplicate issues with the Aggregate and Cross tab options. Now I am having another issues that when I Employee records is showing better with removed duplicates, The issues is the count column still showing huge number like which is affecting the chart based analysis.

entry.title: Re: Result recording is not updating/Overwriting the batc...
entry.content:
Hi Arjuna,

No, the inspection lot doesn't have the status - CLAS -complete classification.

And in the batch values for the lot, the ‘value from inspection’ is updated and the status is =5.

the UD log does not indicate "the results transferred successfully" -

Result Recording was not done forcefully also.

entry.title: Succession Factor Succession - Readiness Alerts, MDF Talent Pool and Mentoring
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Currently, I am looking for the answers on the following query.

Succession readiness - When the nominated successor readiness reaches to the completion dates is there any way we can set the due date alerts to notify the Succession Planner.

MDF Talent Pools  - I would like to set the Nomination notes as mandatory while adding successors within the Talent Pool.

Mentoring -Mentee Matching - I would like to Have the Mentor- Mentee matching with the below Criteria.

Question to Mentor - System should set the eligibility criteria to mentor that only if mentor proficiency level is Advanced/expert level not with intermediate/low level knowledge on the area of expertise

Question to mentee - Mentee should be Intermediate level not from the Beginner level.

entry.title: Talent Intelligence Hub Migration and Impacts
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Currently, our customer has implemented EC, RCM, PMGM and learning.

Now, they have started with the Succession and CDP Implementation. In that they would like to have use Skills in Career worksheet for Suggested roles, Gap Graph and readiness meter. For that we are planning to implement the TIH and growth portfolio. Can anyone suggest me the implementation steps and considerations to migration the JPB to TIH. Are there any downside impacts to the existing implemented modules like RCM,PMGM and learning.

Kindly help me with the step by steps approach to Implement TIH and the timelines for the customer with Huge Entities.

entry.title: How can I activate the inbound processing functionality in "Business Data Scoping"?
entry.content: It is currently not possible to set the inbound function to "active" when configuring the Business Data Scope. Are there any settings necessary in the Communication Scenario or is an OCR license missing? Perhaps someone has an idea?

entry.title: Re: Looking for OData service for posting Journal Entry d...
entry.content:
I want to know solution for this question, too.

Currently, I make work-flow on Process Automation.
After approval, I'd like to add 'Action' for Journal posting,
but only OData API is supported as 'Action', so I cannot choose SOAP API as action.
Therefore, I cannot create work-flow with journal posting action on Process Automation.

Did anyone have solution for this question?

entry.title: Is it possible to pass a string into a UI5 XML formatter function?
entry.content:
When I write a UI5 XML element, I use format function to set its visibility. For example:

<Title text="{
  parts:[
    'label1'					 
    {path:'color'},
  ], 
  formatter: '.formatter.getVisibility'}"
/>

And I want the first parameter, in this case is "label1", is passed into formatter function as a plain string.

But actually, I find out UI5 just drill down of the binding object, it pass the value of variable bindingObject.label1 as first parameter, of course it's undefined. 

Is it possible just pass a plain string "label1" to the formatter function?

entry.title: Create an extended parameters in standard target mapping
entry.content:
Hi there,

I'm wondering if I could configure new parameters in target mapping of standard transaction app (ME23N).

Therefore, I could add extended parameters at the end of URL, navigate to the application and display the specific purchasing document.

entry.title: Re: Change user name in SU01
entry.content:
Hi Hermy,

Are you trying to change the full name sequence ?

entry.title: Is there a replacement for Solman's DVM functionality in Cloud ALM?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a replacement for Solman's DVM functionality in Cloud ALM?

We are planning to migrate from Solution manager to Cloud ALM.
We have been using DVM functionality (Data Volume Management) in Solution Manager.
We would like to use this functionality in Cloud ALM as well.
Which functionality is applicable in Cloud ALM?

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is there a replacement for Solman's DVM functionality...
entry.content:
This information is captured in KBA 3427582 - SAP Solution Manager features and functionality in SAP Cloud ALM

In summary, the Examples section of the Transition to SAP Cloud ALM Support portal page contains several tables listing SAP Solution Manager features.
The table will point to either an equivalent SAP Cloud ALM feature or to more information (and possible alternatives, if available).

In the context of Data Volume Management (DVM), this feature is not planned for SAP Cloud ALM and the recommendation is to use the DVM App in SAP for Me instead.

entry.title: Issue to asset from Project stock(Q)
entry.content:
Is is possible to issue from project stock to asset any material? 
Tried to create new movement type, but can not find any way to add new special stock indicator.

entry.title: How can I disable Swagger in Production but enable Swagger in Development and Staging evironments?
entry.content:
Version: SAP Commerce 2205

How can I disable Swagger in Production environment but enable Swagger in Development and Staging evironments?

In the official Enabling or Disabling Swagger UI guide, it says I need to exclude the swaggerintegration extension. However, I assume this will affect environments.

Is it possible to configure what I need via manifest.json? If not, what is the best practice or approach for this?

entry.title: Error While updating business partner payment terms using DTW in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi,

I am getting below error while doing DTW to update business partner payment terms.

(-1) Please Enter Business Partner Category (-1) Please Enter Business Partner Category

entry.title: User/resource "XXX" does not have the SFC "ABC" in work now (Message 13901)
entry.content: Whenever I am trying to complete an SFC i am getting "User/resource XXX" does not have the SFC "ABC" in work now (Message 13901)"

entry.title: Required the mass retirement of assets functionality
entry.content:
We required the functionality to retire the assets in mass.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Required the mass retirement of assets functionality
entry.content:
In case of a mass retirement (with or without revenue), we recommend you use worklists (Transaction AR01) instead.

Please read KBA 2572879 - How to retire multiple assets by worklist

entry.title: Required the mass retirement of assets functionality
entry.content:
We required the functionality to retire the assets in mass.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Required the mass retirement of assets functionality
entry.content:
In case of a mass retirement (with or without revenue), we recommend you use worklists (Transaction AR01) instead.

Please read KBA 2572879 - How to retire multiple assets by worklist
